page_metadata.biotools__summary: A web-based application for the mapping of prokaryotic genes and the corresponding proteins to common gene regulatory and metabolic networks. Users input a list of genes from which shared operons, co-expressed genes and shared regulators are detected. Common metabolic pathways are then viewed on KEGG maps.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A web-based application for the mapping of prokaryotic genes and the corresponding proteins to common gene regulatory and metabolic networks.
